title: SSL
description: NginxSSLObject schema from NGINX Plus REST API

handshakes.description: The total number of successful SSL handshakes.

handshakes_failed.description: The total number of failed SSL handshakes.

session_reuses.description: The total number of session reuses during SSL handshake.

no_common_protocol.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of no common protocol.

no_common_cipher.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of no shared cipher.

handshake_timeout.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of a timeout.

peer_rejected_cert.description: The number of failed SSL handshakes when nginx presented the certificate to the client but it was rejected with a corresponding alert message.

no_cert.description: A client did not provide the required certificate.

expired_cert.description: An expired or not yet valid certificate was presented by a client.

revoked_cert.description: A revoked certificate was presented by a client.

hostname_mismatch.description: Server's certificate doesn't match the hostname.
